---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  - id: current-projects
    contents: projects
    include:
      filename: "index.qmd"
      categories: "Current"
    fields: [title, image, subtitle, date]
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: past-projects
    contents: projects
    include:
      filename: "index.qmd"
      categories: "Past"
    fields: [title, image, subtitle, date]
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Current Projects

::: {#current-projects}
:::

## Past Projects

::: {#past-projects}
:::
